languages.text: "Я предпочитаю не касаться этой темы. Если вы решили, будто я заглядываюсь на трон Вольного Торговца, то ошиблись. Отец многое для меня сделал, и я всего лишь плачу верностью за верность".

traits.locale_text: "Я предпочитаю не касаться этой темы. Если вы решили, будто я заглядываюсь на трон Вольного Торговца, то ошиблись. Отец многое для меня сделал, и я всего лишь плачу верностью за верность".

languages.text: "I would rather not discuss the matter. If you think I have my eye on the Rogue Trader's throne, you are mistaken. My father has done so much for me, and I am merely repaying his loyalty in kind."
languages.original_text: "Я предпочитаю не касаться этой темы. Если вы решили, будто я заглядываюсь на трон Вольного Торговца, то ошиблись. Отец многое для меня сделал, и я всего лишь плачу верностью за верность".

traits.locale_text: "I would rather not discuss the matter. If you think I have my eye on the Rogue Trader's throne, you are mistaken. My father has done so much for me, and I am merely repaying his loyalty in kind."
"I would rather not discuss the matter. If you think I have my eye on the Rogue Trader's throne, you are mistaken. My father has done so much for me, and I am merely repaying his loyalty in kind."
"I would rather not discuss the matter. If you think I have my eye on the Rogue Trader's throne, you are mistaken. My father has done so much for me, and I am merely repaying his loyalty in kind."

languages.text: “这事我不想谈。你要是觉得我觊觎行商浪人的黄金王座，那你就错了。父亲为我付出了太多，我不过是以忠诚相报罢了。”
languages.original_text: "I would rather not discuss the matter. If you think I have my eye on the Rogue Trader's throne, you are mistaken. My father has done so much for me, and I am merely repaying his loyalty in kind."

traits.locale_text: “这事我不想谈。你要是觉得我觊觎行商浪人的黄金王座，那你就错了。父亲为我付出了太多，我不过是以忠诚相报罢了。”

languages.text: « Je préfère éviter d'aborder la question. Si vous croyez que je convoite le trône du libre-marchand, vous vous trompez. Je dois beaucoup à mon père, et je ne fais que lui rendre la loyauté dont il a fait preuve à mon endroit. »
languages.original_text: "I would rather not discuss the matter. If you think I have my eye on the Rogue Trader's throne, you are mistaken. My father has done so much for me, and I am merely repaying his loyalty in kind."

traits.locale_text: « Je préfère éviter d'aborder la question. Si vous croyez que je convoite le trône du libre-marchand, vous vous trompez. Je dois beaucoup à mon père, et je ne fais que lui rendre la loyauté dont il a fait preuve à mon endroit. »

languages.text: "Bunu konuşmak istemiyorum. Hür Tacir'in tahtında gözüm olduğunu düşünüyorsanız yanılıyorsunuz. Babamın benim için yaptıkları saymakla bitmez. Ben de yalnızca onun sadakatine layık olmaya çalışıyorum."
languages.original_text: "I would rather not discuss the matter. If you think I have my eye on the Rogue Trader's throne, you are mistaken. My father has done so much for me, and I am merely repaying his loyalty in kind."

traits.locale_text: "Bunu konuşmak istemiyorum. Hür Tacir'in tahtında gözüm olduğunu düşünüyorsanız yanılıyorsunuz. Babamın benim için yaptıkları saymakla bitmez. Ben de yalnızca onun sadakatine layık olmaya çalışıyorum."

languages.text: «Preferiría no hablar del tema. Si cree que ando detrás del trono del Comerciante Independiente, se equivoca. Mi padre ha hecho muchísimo por mí, así que tan solo estoy pagándoselo con mi lealtad».
languages.original_text: "I would rather not discuss the matter. If you think I have my eye on the Rogue Trader's throne, you are mistaken. My father has done so much for me, and I am merely repaying his loyalty in kind."

traits.locale_text: «Preferiría no hablar del tema. Si cree que ando detrás del trono del Comerciante Independiente, se equivoca. Mi padre ha hecho muchísimo por mí, así que tan solo estoy pagándoselo con mi lealtad».

languages.text: "Darüber möchte ich lieber nicht sprechen. Wenn Ihr denkt, ich will auf den Thron des Freihändlers, dann irrt Ihr Euch. Mein Vater hat so viel für mich getan. Ich zahle ihm lediglich seine Loyalität zurück."
languages.original_text: "I would rather not discuss the matter. If you think I have my eye on the Rogue Trader's throne, you are mistaken. My father has done so much for me, and I am merely repaying his loyalty in kind."

traits.locale_text: "Darüber möchte ich lieber nicht sprechen. Wenn Ihr denkt, ich will auf den Thron des Freihändlers, dann irrt Ihr Euch. Mein Vater hat so viel für mich getan. Ich zahle ihm lediglich seine Loyalität zurück."

languages.text: 「この件は話し合いません。私、ローグトレーダーの座を狙っていると思っているなら、それは誤解です。父は私をここまで育ててくれた。私はただ、その恩に報いたいだけなのです。」
languages.original_text: "I would rather not discuss the matter. If you think I have my eye on the Rogue Trader's throne, you are mistaken. My father has done so much for me, and I am merely repaying his loyalty in kind."

traits.locale_text: 「この件は話し合いません。私、ローグトレーダーの座を狙っていると思っているなら、それは誤解です。父は私をここまで育ててくれた。私はただ、その恩に報いたいだけなのです。」
